Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Now that we have our AEW aircraft up, let's launch a Combat Air Patrol (CAP) flight.

CAP flights provide for quick defensive reaction to any airborne threats detected by our AEW aircraft, and should be replaced with new CAP flights as your fighters run low on fuel. Note that you as the player are responsible for maintaining your aircraft flights!

Let's use the Flight Deck controls to put up a CAP flight of 2 x MiG-23A Floggers with the Air to Air loadout. Order these aircraft to orbit about 30-40nm ahead of your formation at cruising altitude of 37,000'.
